candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=90%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the signal is structurally unreliable and should be sized to zero regardless of conviction strength.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 14/30 bull, 100% conviction LONG on USDJPY with green_matches=0 means no historical analog has ever produced a winning outcome for this exact indicator configuration — high live agreement on a configuration the library has never validated is overfitting to the present tape, not edge. Institutionally, USDJPY momentum during a CONCENTRATION/AI-led risk-on regime is a safe-haven-corrupted rate signal (per L8), so a 100% bullish read here is precisely the false-confidence trap the green_matches gate exists to catch.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze, log as UNRELIABLE
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Drawdown reduction and Sharpe +0.01–0.03 by vetoing the highest-conviction-but-unvalidated false signals (currently USDJPY 100% conv with 0% historical hit rate would otherwise size up).
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: 0 trades in last 7 days means current gates are already filtering correctly; live consensus shows USDJPY at 100% conviction yet hist_hr=0% and green_matches=0 — exactly the configuration where conviction and historical reliability diverge. EURUSD by contrast shows conv=67% with hist_hr=66%, a validated config.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 sets USDJPY VIX gate at 13 for bull markets, but current regime is CONCENTRATION/UNKNOWN (not clearly bull) with USDJPY at 100% momentum conviction — if regime is no longer a clean bull, the VIX threshold assumption may be miscalibrated and worth re-validating against the new regime label.

reflection.system_health_note: System is correctly frozen (0 trades/7d) under UNKNOWN regime + 75% sizing + no TV confirmation; the live USDJPY 100%-conviction/0%-hist_hr divergence is the main latent risk if any gate loosens.
